'''Twitch''' was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] biker in the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. An [[Alien/Legends|alien]] with blue skin, Twitch developed a deep hatred for [[Droid/Legends|droids]] as he was replaced, in a former career, by one.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]''
